info:
Sajilo Sathi is powered by MSCSLM (Mathematically Similarity Checked Small Language Model) — an open-source JavaScript project that matches your queries to the right information using a similarity algorithm.

It does not use a large AI model — instead it uses mathematical similarity scoring to find the best match from a curated dataset of Nepal child safety and support resources.

🌐 The project is open-source and contributions are welcome under the MIT License.
